name: Get signed URL for upload part | Fanvue API Documentation
snippet: Return a presigned URL to upload a specific part number for creator's media upload session. Scopes required: write:creator, write:media.

name: Get media by UUID | Fanvue API Documentation
snippet: Returns a specific media item by its UUID for the authenticated user. For media with status other than FINALISED, only uuid and status are returned.
